component.name: Aonsoku
component.summary: A modern desktop client for Navidrome/Subsonic servers

ul.li: Subsonic Integration: Aonsoku integrates with your Navidrome or Subsonic server, providing you with easy access to your music collection.
Intuitive UI: Modern, clean and user-friendly interface designed to enhance your music listening experience.

Podcast Support: With Aonsoku Podcasts you can easily access, manage, and listen to your favorites podcasts directly within the app. Enjoy advanced search options, customizable filters and seamless listening synchronization to enhance your podcast experience.
Synchronized lyrics: Aonsoku will automatically find a synced lyric from LRCLIB if none is provided by the server.
Unsynchronized lyrics: If your songs have embedded unsynchronized lyrics, Aonsoku is able to show them.
Radio: If your server supports it, listen to radio shows directly within Aonsoku.
Scrobble: Sync played songs with your server.
Tables: Added tooltips showing song title, artist, and album name.
New Settings: Added an option to enable/disable home page carousel auto-scroll.
Automatic CJK Script Detection: Lyrics in Chinese, Japanese, or Korean now render with Noto Sans for improved readability.
Hide Features: Added new options in content settings to hide specific features across the whole app.
KDE Window Controls: Added new window control icons for KDE.
Local Cache Control: Added cache controls and a clear button to app content settings.
Radio Metadata: Added Icecast radio metadata support.
Localization: Added support for Finnish, Swiss German, Hungarian, and Tamil. Also improved support for existing languages.
New Themes: Added Everforest Dark, Vesper, Mirage, and Arduino Light themes.
NixOS Support: Upgraded pnpm from v9 to v11, since pnpm 9 has reached end-of-life and was slated for removal from nixpkgs.
macOS Dock: Added dock support with play, pause, next, and previous buttons.
macOS Trackpad: Added support for back/forward navigation via trackpad gestures.
ALAC Support: Enforced ALAC playback when needed, using transcoding.
Discord RPC: Fixed RPC not updating activity when seeking or when loop mode was enabled.
Docker Variables: Ensured Docker environment variables are always applied.
Animated Artworks: Added support for animated artworks fetched from Apple Music.
Playback Context: Introduced playback context for the currently playing track (covering albums, artists, playlists, favorites, and songs).
Customizable Sidebar: Added new options in the content settings to hide specific sidebar items.
Genres Page: Added a dedicated Genres page, featuring the ability to shuffle and play up to 500 random tracks from a selected genre.
Performance Optimization: Implemented virtualized lists for large playlists and albums to significantly improve page rendering and performance.
Sticky Headers: Added a sticky header to the album, artist, and playlist pages so playback controls and content titles remain visible while scrolling.
Localization: Added language support for Traditional Cantonese.
Login Validation: Adjusted username and password validation to allow single-character inputs.
Auto-Updater: Fixed an issue where the auto-updater was failing to download and install new updates.
Now Playing: Send now playing event when song starts playing to the server.
Linux Builds: Added AppImage and Tar.gz builds for the arm64 architecture.
Audio Player: Improved audio player performance and stability.
Quality Badge: Improved the rendering of the quality badge.
Window Management: Improved the window management state for Linux.
Scrobble: Fixed an issue where scrobbles were sent instantly when a song started playing.
Home Carousel: Refreshed the visual style of the home carousel and implemented performance optimizations.
Translations: Updated translations for multiple languages.
Docker Setup: Resolved Docker configuration issues when deploying to a subfolder.
Update Notification: Resolved new version notification dialog not being shown.
Replay Gain: Ensure default replay gain is correctly applied to tracks missing replay gain metadata.
Big Player: Fixed a crash occurring in the Big Player when the song queue ends.
macOS Termination: Resolved issues where the app failed to quit completely or partially on macOS.
Linux Shortcuts: Fixed global shortcut registration triggering system dialogs on Wayland sessions.
Subdirectory Deployment: Updated the Vite base URL to support deploying the application within subdirectories.
Favorite Songs: Added a "Favorite Songs" section to the Sidebar.
Open Subsonic Synced Lyrics: Added synced lyrics support for OpenSubsonic API-compatible servers.
Big Player Animation: Enhanced the fullscreen transition animation for the Big Player.
Big Player Trigger: Relocated the Big Player open button to the main player controls (previously on cover art hover).
Enhanced Song Info: Added detailed audio metadata to the quality badge in the songs table.
Shortcut Keys UI: Redesigned the keyboard shortcuts component for better readability.
Image Caching: Introduced an Image Caching option in Content Settings to improve loading times and overall performance.
Reduced App Minimum Size: Reduced the application's minimum window dimensions to better support vertical monitors and tiling window managers.
Localization: Added new languages and expanded coverage for existing translations.
Custom LRCLIB Instances: Added an option in Privacy Settings to configure custom self-hosted or private LRCLIB URLs.
Playlist Visibility Icons: Updated the icons used to distinguish between public and private playlists
Empty State Layout: Fixed an issue where empty state spacing caused unnecessary page scrolling.
Sidebar Interaction: Disabled the sidebar toggle button when the Queue or Lyrics panels are open.
Security Updates: Updated project dependencies to address security vulnerabilities.
Playlist Management: Fixed an issue preventing users from clearing playlist comments/descriptions.
Sample Rate Display: Corrected the sample rate label display.
Dynamic Sidebar: Added a toggle to resize the sidebar width.
Discord Rich Presence: Added support to share the currently playing song via Discord Rich Presence.
Minimize to Tray: Added support for minimizing the app to the system tray with accessible player controls.
About Dialog: Improved the styling of the "About" information dialog.
New Languages: Added support for Canadian French, Italian, Korean, Malay, Polish, Turkish, and Ukrainian.
Sync Lyrics Cache: Implemented a persistent cache layer for synced lyrics to improve performance on subsequent requests.
Security: Fixed an XSS vulnerability in the sanitization function.
UI: Fixed shadow rendering for Album, Playlist, and Artist titles.
